description: A railway track engineer is reviewing a SolveSpace drawing of a fishplate (splice bar) cross-section profile at /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/fishplate_start.slvs. Correct the two linear dimension constraints and one angle constraint in the drawing to match the specification document found on the Desktop. Save the corrected file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/fishplate_corrected.slvs and export the DXF to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/fishplate_corrected.dxf.
